title: Brain-computer interfaces could create a new digital divide, and this time it may be biological
summary: As BCIs move from laboratories towards commercial use, Neurochip.com founder Herbert Sim warns that unequal access could separate people not only by income or connectivity, but by physical and cognitive capability.
